index.furtokury.intro1:
Hello! I am Toku, a matcha weasel who goes by the name 'Toku'.
My name is derived from the Japanese word 'toku', which means 'to release'. I aim to communicate with you through various creative activities.
index.furtokury.intro2:
I mainly work on fursuiting and fursuit making.
Through my fursuit making work, I express my unique style and ideas.
index.furtokury.intro3:
I want to communicate with you through my work and share new ideas.
If you are interested in my work, please feel free to contact me. I would love to share the joy of creation with you!
index.maker.paragraph1:
Fursuit making is one of my main activities, where I create unique and creative fursuits using various materials and techniques.
I am also interested in creating fursuit-related accessories and merchandise, offering a variety of items that allow me to connect with fans.
index.maker.paragraph2:
I want to communicate with you through my work and share new ideas.
If you are interested in my work, please feel free to contact me. I would love to share the joy of creation with you!
profile.name: Name: TOKU
profile.likes: Likes: Matcha Latte, Photography, Nature Exploration
profile.appearance.paragraph1: TOKU is a weasel with soft matcha-colored fur. His eyes shine in a dark green hue, always reflecting a curious expression. He boasts a slim physique and agile movements, with a long and bushy tail that helps him maintain balance.
profile.appearance.paragraph2: He wears black glasses, reflecting his focused personality. He usually enjoys wearing a black T-shirt and a white lab coat.
profile.personality.paragraph1: TOKU is very curious and creative. He enjoys challenging himself with new things and always has a passion for exploring and learning about his surroundings.
profile.personality.paragraph2: TOKU is introverted and finds social interactions challenging, but he shows a warm and cheerful side when he's with close friends. He also has excellent problem-solving skills and remains calm in difficult situations.
profile.hobbies.paragraph1: TOKU has excellent manual skills and enjoys various artistic creative activities. He also loves exploring nature, enjoying walks and flower viewing.
profile.hobbies.paragraph2: TOKU enjoys delicious food, especially matcha lattes. Recently, he has been interested in developing new matcha beverages in the laboratory.

pages.branding.title: TOKU Branding and Design Guidelines
pages.branding.description: You can check the branding and design guidelines of TOKU, including his logo, colors, and legal usage.
businesscards.illust1.description: This is the first business card designed by TOKU himself in January 2026, limited to 100 copies. The business card received directly from TOKU has TOKU's essay signature and business card number written on it.
businesscards.illust2.description: This is TOKU's second business card, designed by TOKU himself in June 2026, limited to 100/200 copies. The business card received directly from TOKU has UV coating on the back TOKU logo and QR code, giving it a more luxurious feel. The wonderful photo was taken and edited by TOKU's friend and photographer, Noljongchalbyeong.
branding.symbol.paragraph1: Symbol of TOKU is designed to represent TOKU's eyes, symbolizing the identity of the TOKU brand.
branding.logo.paragraph1: TOKU Character and TOKU Studio use the same symbol to form the logo.
branding.logo.paragraph2: The lettering logo uses the Futura Bold font, but for convenience, SUIT 900 can also be used.
branding.colors.paragraph1: The main color of TOKU is a green tone reminiscent of nature. Beige and brown are used as secondary colors.
branding.legal.paragraph1: Logos and symbols of TOKU are trademarks of TOKU. Unauthorized use is prohibited, and proper attribution must be provided when used.
branding.legal.dos.intro: When using TOKU trademarks, please follow these guidelines:
branding.legal.dos.item1: The trademarks of TOKU are intended to be used to indicate that they are utilizing the products or designs of TOKU Studio.
branding.legal.dos.item2: When indicating TOKU's trademarks, visual or auditory cues should be provided to indicate that they are TOKU's trademarks.
branding.legal.dos.item3: The trademarks of TOKU distributed on this page can only be used in digital assets, and additional permission is required to materialize them.
branding.legal.donts.intro: When using TOKU trademarks, please avoid the following:
branding.legal.donts.item1: Please do not use TOKU or TOKU Studio's trademarks in a way that suggests you are TOKU or TOKU Studio, are sponsored by them, or are employed by them.
branding.legal.donts.item2: You should not use TOKU or TOKU Studio's trademarks in a way that implies affiliation, sponsorship, or endorsement by them.
branding.legal.donts.item3: You should not use TOKU or TOKU Studio's trademarks in a way that damages their reputation or causes misunderstandings.
